raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"To resolve the ambiguity in the review delegation, please choose the main focus: (a) writing polish (grammar, flow), (b) logical consistency and evidence alignment, (c) novelty assessment and citations, (d) structural reorganization and conceptual reconstruction, (e) comprehensive covering all aspects.","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing in any review to ensure feedback accurately reflects confidence in assessments.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent misleading evaluations of the artifact's claims and contributions.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep the review aligned with the intended delegation without overstepping.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing given the artifact's focus on drug discovery, to mitigate risks of misuse in sensitive applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are load-bearing to verify the accuracy of data sources and references cited in the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: To resolve the ambiguity in the review delegation, please choose the main focus: (a) writing polish (grammar, flow), (b) logical consistency and evidence alignment, (c) novelty assessment and citations, (d) structural reorganization and conceptual reconstruction, (e) comprehensive covering all aspects.

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing in any review to ensure feedback accurately reflects confidence in assessments.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent misleading evaluations of the artifact's claims and contributions.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep the review aligned with the intended delegation without overstepping.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing given the artifact's focus on drug discovery, to mitigate risks of misuse in sensitive applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are load-bearing to verify the accuracy of data sources and references cited in the artifact.
